Category: Finance & Professional Services: Banking, Insurance, Accounting, Consulting, Legal, Real Estate
Who is this for: Auditors, Accountants, Financial Analysts, Compliance Officers, Risk Management Specialists, Internal Auditors, External Auditors, Certified Public Accountants, Financial Controllers, Audit Managers
Team or Dept this is for: Finance, Audit, Risk Management, Compliance, Internal Audit, Accounting
Description: Challenges in validating AI-assisted accounting and audit work.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with accounting or audit principles, along with a general awareness of how AI tools are being used in professional services, is all that is needed to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key risks associated with AI-generated outputs in accounting and audit workflows, and explain the limitations that make such outputs challenging to validate in professional practice. You will also apply practical frameworks to assess the reliability of AI-assisted audit work, helping you to uphold accuracy and compliance standards within your organisation.
